extra.reason: Installed bd 1.0.4, initialized .beads, accepted generated AGENTS.md workflow instructions and created the Goal 001 task graph.

Active dev-preview/migration audit passed. rg over active API/dashboard/schema/skill code found only guard/smoke references; focused operator endpoint/content URL tests, marketer language guard and live_contract_smoke all passed.

Active raw fallback cleanup passed for touched marketer surfaces: no bare brak/brak danych patterns remain in the scanned active sources beyond negative test assertions, focused tests and live API proof passed, and no React remapper or stale alias was introduced.

Recovery docs are aligned with the current Beads graph: closed label cleanup is no longer listed as active work, docs point to bd ready for the queue, and Goal 001 completion check still records UAT/defer as the blocker.
AGENTS.md now includes Beads recovery commands and WILQ-specific source-of-truth boundaries.
Owner defer recorded in docs/handoffs/2026-06-30-owner-defer-marketer-uat.json and validated with scripts/goal_001_completion_check.py --owner-defer

Anti-slop baseline implemented: scripts/audit_complexity.py reports Python hotspots and frozen-file growth risk; proof recorded in docs/handoffs/2026-06-30-goal-002-anti-slop-baseline.md; focused checks passed and historical Ruff/mypy/Fallow failures are documented as baseline debt.

Completed behavior-preserving API route extraction: main.py no longer declares direct @app.get/@app.post route handlers; all endpoint paths are preserved through routers; focused Codex/context route smoke, API tests, Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity and git diff --check passed. Remaining heavy context-pack runtime extraction is tracked separately as wilq-seo-462.

Completed behavior-preserving content diagnostics extraction baseline: canonical URL semantics, preflight verdicts, inventory gates, planning decisions, GSC/Ahrefs/GA4/vendor-read decisions, marketer preflight view, API labels, diagnostic sections and operator summary now live under wilq/content. Focused content/API tests and import-boundary smoke passed. Remaining inventory records, ContentWorkItem, preflight v2, claims, drafting, handoff and measurement work is tracked as Goal 002 feature issues.

Completed ContentWorkItem workflow state baseline: typed model and transition blockers now prove preflight, sales brief, claim ledger, human review, audit and measurement gates cannot be skipped. Draft/handoff require a measurement plan, while outcome claims remain blocked until the measurement window is ready.

Completed Content Inventory v1 baseline: structured inventory records and resolution now support preserve-first decisions, missing canonical blockers, dev-preview canonical rejection, duplicate-risk blockers and create_after_review only after a clear duplicate check.

Completed ContentPreflight v2 domain verdict: blocked, plan_allowed, brief_allowed, draft_allowed and handoff_allowed states now compose ContentWorkItem and Content Inventory v1 without drafting, writing or React-side decision logic.

Completed Claim Ledger v1 baseline: claims are structured data with allowed, review-required, blocked and blocked-until-measurement statuses; blocked or unreviewed risky claims cannot be publish-ready and draft remains blocked when claim review/evidence is missing.

Completed Sales Brief v1 baseline: typed brief contract now builds only from valid work item/preflight/inventory/claim ledger inputs, with required evidence, final canonical URL, source facts, forbidden claims and measurement plan. No draft generation or React-side decision logic was added.

Completed Draft Package v1 baseline: outline-first draft packages now build only after draft_allowed preflight, matching Sales Brief, matching Claim Ledger and source-fact evidence mapping. Packages include brief_id, claim_ledger_id, section-to-evidence map, publish-ready claims, blocked claims removed, human review questions and publish_ready=false. Checks passed: tests/content/test_draft_package.py, tests/content, Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new module, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.

Completed Human Review v1 baseline: added typed content human review records for sales brief, claim ledger, draft package and WordPress handoff stages. Review requires reviewer, decision, checked items, evidence IDs and handled blocked claims; only approved review can update ContentWorkItem to human_review_status=approved and unblock the WordPress handoff gate. Checks passed: tests/content/test_human_review.py, tests/content, Ruff on touched files, mypy on new review/workflow modules, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.

Completed WordPress Draft Handoff v1 baseline: added prepare-only draft handoff contract requiring public final canonical URL, matching Draft Package, approved Human Review and audit envelope with evidence IDs. Handoff blocks dev preview canonical targets, non-approved review, missing audit, mismatched draft packages and publish-ready draft packages; it emits post_status=draft, publish_allowed=false and destructive_update_allowed=false, and only marks workflow draft_created when a real WordPress post ID is provided. Checks passed: tests/content/test_wordpress_handoff.py, tests/content, Ruff on touched files, mypy on new handoff/workflow modules, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check.

Completed Content Measurement Window v1 baseline: added measurement window contract with baseline period, observation period, earliest verdict date, allowed metrics, source connectors, evidence IDs and optional WordPress handoff link. Outcome claims stay blocked before the window reaches ready_for_review/closed after earliest_verdict_date; handoff requires or schedules a measurement window. Checks passed: tests/content/test_measurement_window.py, tests/content, Ruff on touched files, mypy on the new measurement module, import-boundary smoke, scripts/audit_complexity.py --changed --allow-frozen and staged git diff --check.

Completed behavior-preserving context-pack runtime extraction: main.py delegates daily, skill-scoped and full-context context-pack construction to focused runtime modules; full-context assembly moved to apps/api/wilq_api/context_full.py; focused full-context tests, Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check passed.

Completed first content workflow API bridge: POST /api/content/work-items/preflight exposes ContentWorkItem, Content Inventory v1 and ContentPreflight v2 through a focused router/domain API model; focused API tests prove dev preview canonical is blocked, valid preserve-first item preserves evidence/source connectors and existing GET /api/content/preflight shape stays unchanged; Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check passed.

Completed Sales Brief API bridge: POST /api/content/work-items/sales-brief computes Content Inventory resolution and ContentPreflight v2, then calls the typed Sales Brief v1 builder; focused API tests prove valid preserve-first brief generation, missing source-fact blockers, forbidden claim visibility, and no draft/WordPress artifacts; Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check passed.

Completed Draft Package API bridge: POST /api/content/work-items/draft-package computes inventory resolution and ContentPreflight v2, builds or accepts Sales Brief v1, then calls the typed Draft Package v1 builder. Focused API tests prove outline-first publish_ready=false package creation, preflight-not-draft-allowed blocking, Claim Ledger blocking, no WordPress handoff and section-to-evidence mapping; Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check passed.

Completed Human Review API bridge: POST /api/content/work-items/human-review calls typed Human Review v1 blockers, updates ContentWorkItem only after blocker-free review, reports wordpress_handoff_allowed without creating handoffs. Focused API tests prove approved review state update, missing reviewer/checklist/evidence blockers, needs_changes blocker and blocked-claim handling; Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check passed.

Completed WordPress Draft Handoff API bridge: POST /api/content/work-items/wordpress-draft-handoff calls the typed prepare-only builder, returns prepared draft-only handoff or blockers, and never calls WordPress or publishes. Focused API tests prove valid prepared handoff, missing audit blocker, non-approved review blocker, dev canonical blocker, publish_allowed=false, destructive_update_allowed=false and evidence preservation; Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check passed.

Completed Measurement Window API bridge: POST /api/content/work-items/measurement-window calls the typed Content Measurement Window v1 builder, returns a planned window or blockers, applies measurement_window_status/id only when created, keeps success_claim_allowed=false while planned, exposes early outcome blockers, and blocks missing metrics, missing connectors and dev canonical. Focused API/domain tests, Ruff, mypy, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check passed.

Completed focused content workflow API chain smoke: one fixture-backed Ekologus work item now goes through preflight, sales brief, draft package, human review, WordPress draft handoff and measurement window endpoints. The proof asserts evidence persistence, publish_ready=false, WordPress publish_allowed=false/destructive_update_allowed=false, measurement success_claim_allowed=false and early outcome blockers. Focused pytest, Ruff, audit_complexity --changed --allow-frozen and git diff --check passed.

Completed typed dashboard API boundary for Goal 002 content workflow: shared schemas parse preflight, sales brief, draft package, human review, WordPress draft handoff and measurement window responses; dashboard api.ts exposes thin POST helpers for all /api/content/work-items/* endpoints. Tests, typecheck, lint, Fallow audit and git diff --check passed; Fallow inherited index.ts duplicate findings remain excluded by gate.

Completed marketer-facing /content-workflow route with ordered API-owned content workflow steps, draft-only WordPress handoff copy, measurement outcome blocker copy, focused route test, dashboard typecheck/lint, Fallow audit and diff-check proof.
Completed API-owned content workflow control snapshot and rewired /content-workflow to fetch it from WILQ API.
Completed diagnostics-derived content workflow snapshot and removed the public control-snapshot fallback.
Diagnostics-derived content workflow snapshot no longer fabricates approved human review, audit or WordPress handoff; API/dashboard/schema checks and live HTTP proof passed.

Persisted snapshot Human Review path added: valid current-work-item review is stored in local SQLite and applied by later snapshot reads; wrong work-item review does not persist; WordPress handoff remains blocked without audit. Focused API/store/schema/dashboard checks, Ruff, mypy, typecheck/lint, Fallow and diff-check passed.
